name: treemap
title: Treemap
description: Space-filling treemap that sizes six token-colored cells in proportion to a metric, each labeled with a category name and value. Uses a squarified layout (Bruls et al.) so rectangles stay near-square, and hovering the chart spotlights one cell while dimming the rest. Deterministic from a seed via the OOW.treemap renderer mounted by auto-mount.js; tiny cells drop their labels automatically.
